name: Held Item Change
desc: Server confirms the player's held item slot change (echo back of C09).
notes: This is the server echo of C09PacketHeldItemChange. The client uses this to stay in sync with the server on which hotbar slot is selected.

modules.name: AutoTool
modules.purpose: Detect forced slot change from server. Respond with slot sync.

modules.name: InventoryManager
modules.purpose: Detect forced slot change from server. Respond with slot sync.
